description: Diagnostic fixed-iteration objective metric. Every canonical case contributes through the same explicit math and equal weight, then the final aggregate is scaled by 100 for readability.
weighting_note: All canonical objective cases currently use equal weight 1.0, so the diagnostic metric is 100 times the arithmetic mean of the per-case normalized scores.

cases.explanation: Reference final score from the checked-in hard-case fixed-iteration diagnostic baseline.
